subject: [PATCH] exportfs: drop unused is_export parameter from xtab_read() and xtab_write()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The reviewer posted a follow-up reply to correct the subject line of the patch, which was incorrectly labeled as '[PATCH]'. The actual label should be '[nfs-utils PATCH]'.

2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch removes the unused 'is_export' parameter from two functions, xtab_read() and xtab_write(), in the exportfs code. The parameter is always passed as 1, so it's unnecessary and can be simplified by eliminating dead code paths.
